recalls.reason: If a new primary image set is selected while the cine loop is running, the primary image set will be displayed as both primary and secondary image set in all side-by-side views. This will also be true for any new patient or case opened while the cine loop is running

recalls.reason: Potential for the invalidation for calculated radiation dose does not work as intended for certain Regions of Interest (ROIs). This issue occurs for some ROI(s) which have no contours and either have a material override defined, or are of type Bolus, Fixation, or Support. In these cases, adding geometry to the ROI, subsequently modifying geometry, or removing the material override does not invalidate dose as intended.
